title: Scroll Bar Arrows
excerpt: Is there an option to activate or turn on directional arrow buttons on the scroll bars for boards? Members of my team were asking if this was a feature or option. I see they are above and below the scroll bar here on the…

posts.author: josbri (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an option to activate or turn on directional arrow buttons on the scroll bars for boards? Members of my team were asking if this was a feature or option. I see they are above and below the scroll bar here on the community board.
